title: Immersive Thunder Fix
description: (Subjectively) Corrects the sound speed and volume of the Immersive Thunder mod
body:
**This pack is built-in in on my other project - <u> [Eclectic Sounds](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/eclectic_sounds)</u> - which I do recommend trying out!**

After trying out [Immersive Thunder](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersivethunder) I realized it's sounds seemed very out of place and kind of gameplay intrusive, so I corrected them.

This pack **only alters** [Immersive Thunder](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersivethunder)'s sounds.

If there's an issue you can message me on discord "pocinhas"
